opening_summary: Groww app users are experiencing poor customer support, technical issues, and unsatisfactory charges.

top_themes.theme_name: Poor Customer Support and App Performance
top_themes.summary: Customers are experiencing poor support and technical issues with the app.
bullet_points: Users face slow and sluggish app performance
App crashes and glitches affect trading
Customer support is unresponsive and unhelpful
Users experience losses due to old data
App issues lead to frustrating user experience

top_themes.summary: The app is experiencing technical issues and glitches.
bullet_points: App glitches cause trading issues
Interface is becoming poor and difficult to use
App crashes during high trading positions
Glitches lead to unresponsive customer support
Users experience difficulties with buying and selling

top_themes.summary: Users are complaining about high charges and fees.
bullet_points: Brokerage charges are high compared to others
Users experience high charges for intraday trading
Charges are not competitive with other brokers
Users are dissatisfied with fee structure
High charges affect user's financial decisions

action_ideas.action: Improve Customer Support and App Performance
bullet_points: Hire more customer support agents
Implement a more efficient ticketing system
Conduct regular app performance checks
Gather user feedback for improvement
Provide regular updates and fixes
action_ideas.linked_theme: Poor Customer Support and App Performance

bullet_points: Conduct thorough testing before updates
Implement a bug tracking system
Provide clear instructions for users

Provide regular updates and fixes

bullet_points: Conduct market research on competitor fees
Gather user feedback on fee structure
